title: Fx inability to scroll on mobile on Authorization page
author: aeosntw
pr_body_excerpt:
Remove `useScrollLock` call for non-mobile devices.
Maintains status quo for desktop and wider screens.

Fixes [#12000](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations/issues/12000)

gist.headline: Smooth scrolling ahead
gist.blurb: Fixed a pesky bug that was freezing the screen on mobile devices during authorization. You can now scroll freely again!
gist.summary: Removed an errant useScrollLock call on the Authorization page that was preventing mobile users from scrolling.
gist.impact: Mobile users can now scroll normally when authorizing apps, while desktop behavior remains unchanged.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee mascot unrolling a long physical scroll coming out of a giant retro mobile phone held by the Monitor Robot, symbolizing fixing the scrolling issue on mobile.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot unrolling a long, flowing digital scroll coming out of a giant retro mobile phone. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds the phone, its screen showing a happy face. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
